html:
Exclusive to:

EmptyHas spirit

“It is used to move Headstones.”

-

The Spirit Vessel is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wendy after unlocking the "Gravestones By Wendy" skill and it requires 1 Ashes and 1 Broken Shell to craft.

Wendy with the "Grave Beautification" skill can use the Spirit Vessel on the Headstone to store it in the Vessel and relocate it. Spirit Vessel with headstone inside will get new icon and will show a little ghost when is dropped. Once placed in a new location, the Spirit Vessel is consumed.

Gallery

  • Idle animation when on the ground

Wendy with the "Grave Beautification" skill can use the Spirit Vessel on the Headstone to store it in the Vessel and relocate it. Spirit Vessel with headstone inside will get new icon and will show a little ghost when is dropped. Once placed in a new location, the Spirit Vessel is consumed.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Spirit Vessel là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wendy sau khi mở khóa kỹ năng " Gravestones By Wendy " và nó cần 1 Tro tàn và 1 Vỏ vỡ để chế tạo.

{{Scrapbook Info|It is used to move Headstones.}}

The '''Spirit Vessel''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Wendy]] after unlocking the "[[Gravestones By Wendy]]" skill and it requires 1 [[Ashes]] and 1 [[Broken Shell (DST)|Broken Shell]] to craft. 

Wendy with the "[[Grave Beautification]]" skill can use the Spirit Vessel on the [[Grave/DST|Headstone]] to store it in the Vessel and relocate it. Spirit Vessel with headstone inside will get new icon and will show a little ghost when is dropped. Once placed in a new location, the Spirit Vessel is consumed.
